$comment: Concept->skill back-link for `flywheel status`. Skill-keyed (easier to author than concept-keyed across ~975 concepts). Populates ConceptLike.skills so the concept stage of the flywheel lineage renders EXPLICIT links WITHOUT --allow-heuristic. PARTIAL BY DESIGN: only defensible pairs are seeded; unmapped concepts stay empty (no fabrication). Concept ids are from the .college `coding` department (grep `id:` in .college/departments/coding/). The durable auto-population across all skills x concepts is a separate (semantic/embedding) effort.
